heading: Environmental restoration and waste management program
label: 13476 Environmental restoration and waste management program

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: a Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary for fiscal year 1993 $70,000,000 for the Fast Flux Test Facility to maintain the operational status of the reactor, such sums to be derived from amounts appropriated to the Secretary for the environmental restoration and waste management program.

children.heading: Long-term missions
children.label: b Long-term missions
children.text: The Secretary shall aggressively pursue the development and implementation of long-term missions for the Fast Flux Test Facility. Within 6 months after , the Secretary shall submit to the Congress a report on the progress made in carrying out this subsection.October 24, 1992
